name: Crypto Price Drop from Global Event
short_description: Calculates the new price of a crypto asset after a global event causes a percentage drop.

inputs.name: initial_price
inputs.description: The original price of the crypto asset in USD.

inputs.name: drop_percentage
inputs.description: The percentage by which the price drops.

name: Crypto Volume Increase Due to Global Event
short_description: Calculates the new trading volume of a crypto asset after an increase due to a global event.

inputs.name: initial_volume
inputs.description: Original trading volume of the crypto asset in USD

inputs.name: increase_percentage
inputs.description: Percentage increase in trading volume (e.g., 5 for 5%)

name: Regulatory Impact on Crypto Price
short_description: Calculates the new price of a crypto asset after a regulatory event causes a percentage price change.

inputs.name: initial_price
inputs.description: The original price of the crypto asset in USD.

inputs.name: impact_percentage
inputs.description: The percentage change in price (e.g., -5 for a 5% decrease, 5 for a 5% increase).

name: Market Sentiment Shift Impact on Crypto Market Cap
short_description: Calculates the new market capitalization of a crypto asset after a percentage shift in market sentiment.

inputs.name: initial_market_cap
inputs.description: The initial market capitalization of the crypto asset in USD.

inputs.name: sentiment_change
inputs.description: The percentage change in market sentiment (e.g., 8 for an 8% increase, -5 for a 5% decrease).

name: Multi-Factor Crypto Price Impact from Global Events
short_description: Calculates the final price of a crypto asset by summing the percentage impacts from various global factors like liquidity, geopolitical events, and regulatory decisions.

inputs.name: initial_price
inputs.description: The starting price of the crypto asset in USD.

inputs.name: liquidity_impact
inputs.description: The percentage change in price due to liquidity changes (e.g., 3 for 3%, -2 for -2%).

inputs.name: geopolitical_impact
inputs.description: The percentage change in price due to geopolitical events (e.g., 4 for 4%, -1 for -1%).

inputs.name: regulatory_impact
inputs.description: The percentage change in price due to regulatory decisions (e.g., 5 for 5%, -3 for -3%).
